title: CyberPeace / Autobot refinery-sector attack telemetry
sub: Use as pressure evidence, corrected to roughly 3.6 lakh events on simulated refinery-sector sensors, not 3.6 million real refinery breaches.

title: Seqrite SideCopy analysis
sub: Use as phishing and oil-and-gas lure evidence: HPCL-themed cybersecurity-guideline decoys, MSI staging, CurlBack RAT, Spark RAT, and Xeno RAT.

title: Oil India ransomware incident record
sub: Use as Indian oil-and-gas incident precedent: ransomware demand, G&R workstation, network outage, and central-agency response.

title: Anthropic Project Glasswing
sub: Use as frontier-cyber-AI context: restricted Mythos Preview access for defensive vulnerability discovery and critical-software hardening.

title: Guardian reporting on Mythos access concerns
sub: Use as control-plane caution: powerful defensive cyber-AI access itself becomes a security object.
